rationale: Acting on Review 2 yields only a trivial `simp` vs `simp only` edit (plus optional direct proof) in fiberHomeomorph; the original `simp [Set.mem_preimage, eq_comm, map_proj]` already works, matches style of nearby `simp only` uses, and changes nothing material to proof quality or maintainability. Review 1's sound approve therefore produces an equivalent merged PR.
